meta.copyright_policy: Store title, published date, source URL, short summary, classification fields only. Do not store full article text.
meta.schema_note: This file is designed to be loaded directly by global_livestock_news_dashboard_improved.html via ./news-data.json.

articles.title: Feed additive market focus shifts toward gut health and feed efficiency
articles.summary: Feed producers are reviewing additives that support nutrient utilization, gut health, and cost control under volatile raw material conditions.
articles.why_it_matters: PM 관점에서는 성장성, FCR, 영양소 이용률 중심의 claim과 제품 포지셔닝을 점검할 필요가 있습니다.

articles.title: Feed safety guidance highlights traceability and supplier verification
articles.summary: Feed companies are placing more emphasis on ingredient traceability, supplier documentation, and quality assurance systems.
articles.why_it_matters: 원료 추적성, QC 자료, 제조 일관성 메시지를 기술자료에 반영할 수 있습니다.

articles.title: Yeast-based solutions remain under review for animal health and performance
articles.summary: Recent feed industry coverage discusses how yeast type and product selection can affect animal health and performance positioning.
articles.why_it_matters: 효모·postbiotic 계열 제품은 안정성, 균주·원료 차이, 적용 축종별 근거 수준을 구분해야 합니다.

articles.title: Amino acid and vitamin markets remain cautious amid weak demand
articles.summary: Market reports indicate cautious activity in key feed-grade amino acids and vitamins, with buyers and sellers monitoring supply-demand balance.
articles.why_it_matters: 원료 가격 변화는 matrix value, 배합비 절감, 기능성 첨가제의 경제성 메시지와 연결됩니다.

articles.title: Heat stress nutrition programs expand across poultry and swine
articles.summary: Seasonal programs increasingly combine antioxidants, electrolytes, phytogenics, and gut-support additives to reduce heat stress impact.
articles.why_it_matters: 하절기 캠페인에서 feed intake, oxidative stress, gut barrier 관련 메시지로 확장할 수 있습니다.

articles.title: Postbiotic applications move further into commercial feed programs
articles.summary: Postbiotic ingredients are increasingly positioned as stable alternatives or complements to live microbial products in feed programs.
articles.why_it_matters: Postbiotic 제품은 안정성, 면역, 장건강 claim을 근거 수준별로 정리하는 것이 중요합니다.

articles.title: US pork exports to Philippines up 26% in April
articles.summary: Pork export data indicate stronger shipments to the Philippines, with four-month shipments also above the previous year.
articles.why_it_matters: 돈육 수출입 흐름은 고객사의 생산성 개선, 원가 관리, 시장 대응 니즈와 연결될 수 있습니다.

articles.title: Hog futures mixed as pork prices slide
articles.summary: Market coverage reports mixed hog futures and movement in pork prices, reflecting short-term market pressure.
articles.why_it_matters: 단기 시장 동향은 영업 대화 소재로는 활용 가능하지만 제품 claim과의 직접성은 제한적입니다.

articles.title: UConn researchers test postbiotics to cut Salmonella in poultry
articles.summary: Research coverage describes postbiotic use as a potential tool to reduce Salmonella contamination risk in poultry processing.
articles.why_it_matters: Postbiotic, pathogen control, food safety 관련 claim 개발 시 적용 가능성과 규제 표현을 함께 검토해야 합니다.

articles.title: Australia ramps up avian influenza testing
articles.summary: Poultry health monitoring remains focused on avian influenza testing and biosecurity response.
articles.why_it_matters: 질병 이슈는 면역, 항산화, 장건강, 생산성 저하 대응 메시지와 연결 가능합니다.
